COA (see trace #100850939011) RB/2A THB 2,946.50+++ per night -18% comm kickback THB 624.25 net -Pty 2 rooms

AdjoiningRoom, BabyCot, LargeBed, Smoke, smoking preference: Non-Smoking, You have received a virtual credit card for this reservation.You may charge it as of 2026-07-21. AdjoiningRoom, BabyCot, LargeBed, Smoke

Breakfast is included in the room rate. Lunch costs THB 1,300 per person per night. Dinner costs THB 1,900 per person per night. Children and Extra Bed Policy: Children of any age are allowed. 1 child (up to and including 2 years old) stays for free when using available cots. 1 child (from 3 years old to 11 years old) stays for THB 900 per child per night when using available extra beds. 1 person (12 years old and over) stays for THB 1,800 per person per night when using available extra beds. The maximum number of extra beds is 1. The maximum number of cots is 1. The maximum number of guests is 3. Deposit Policy: The guest will be charged a prepayment of the total price of the reservation at any time. Cancellation Policy: The guest will be charged the total price of the reservation if they cancel at any time.
Board description: Breakfast is included in the room rate. Lunch costs THB 1,300 per person per night. Dinner costs THB 1,900 per person per night.

G_ROOM.PROF_ATTACHED: T- Booking.com G- 100850939012 PETRAK, KANYARAT
